title: Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand (trade paperback)
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:MaraJadeByTheEmperorsHandTPB.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Mara Jade –
By the Emperor's Hand'' |writer=*[[Timothy Zahn]] *[[Michael A. Stackpole]] |penciller=[[Carlos Ezquerra]] |inker=[[Carlos Ezquerra]] |letterer=[[Michael Taylor]] |colorist=[[James Sinclair]] |cover artist=[[Kilian Plunkett]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[September 1]], [[1999]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/48-101/Star-Wars-Mara-Jade---By-the-Emperors-Hand-TPB|text=Star Wars: Mara Jade - By the Emperor's Hand TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=144 |isbn=1569714010 |isbn2= |timeline=[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]–[[4 ABY/Legends|4.5 ABY]] |series=''[[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand]]'' |issues= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand''''' collects all six issues from the ''[[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand]]'' series of comics. It was released [[September 1]], [[1999]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Mara Jade is beautiful, intelligent—and deadly! She is the personal assassin of the Empire's dark overlord. But after the Emperor's death, an unforeseen variable is about to enter the scene of her final mission, the assassination of the leader of the Black Nebula crime organization. Though her master is dead, Jade must complete her final mission… even if it costs her life!'' ==Contents== *''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 0]]'' *''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 1]]'' *''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 2]]'' *''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 3]]'' *''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 4]]'' *''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 5]]'' *''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 6]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/48-101/Star-Wars-Mara-Jade---By-the-Emperors-Hand-TPB|text=Star Wars: Mara Jade - By the Emperor's Hand TPB}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: მარა ჯეიდი: იმპერატორის ხელით (რბილყდიანი კრებული) |pl=Mara Jade: Ręka Imperatora (wydanie zbiorcze) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Mara Jade}} [[Category:Dark Horse Comics trade paperbacks]] [[Category:Legends trade paperbacks]]
